question: Is the image depicted from a two-thirds overhead view?
Is the scene a sci-fi laboratory in a realistic style with clean, cool-toned lighting?
Is there a silver-gray metal lab bench centered in the frame?
Are there exactly two robotic arms extending from the back left corner of the bench?
Does the robotic arm closer to the viewer have white casing with faux wood grain texture on the joint covers?
Is the gripper of the closer robotic arm open and facing the center of the table?
Does the robotic arm further back have dark gray casing with prominent black rubber rings at the joints?
Is the gripper of the further robotic arm half-closed?
Are there exactly two holographic cubes floating between the robotic arms?
Is the left holographic cube blue, semi-transparent, and glowing?
Is the right holographic cube bright orange, semi-transparent, and glowing?
Do both holographic cubes have glowing halos at their edges?
Is there a black and white microscope with a heavy base at the back right of the bench?
Is the microscope eyepiece facing towards the upper left?
Is there a transparent test tube rack containing exactly 6 test tubes positioned in front of the microscope?
Does the first test tube (leftmost) contain bright green liquid?
Does the second test tube contain metallic silver opaque liquid?
Does the third test tube contain purple liquid?
Does the fourth test tube contain colorless transparent liquid?
Does the fifth test tube contain orange liquid?
Does the sixth test tube (rightmost) contain sky blue liquid?
Do all 6 test tubes have small silver caps?
Are there exactly two wide-mouth glass beakers to the left of the test tube rack?
Are the beakers arranged with one in front and one in back?
Does the front beaker contain a small amount of colorless liquid with graduation lines on the wall?
Is the back beaker empty but with water droplets on the wall?
Are there safety goggles placed upside down in front of the beakers?
Do the safety goggles have light pink lenses with cool light reflections?
Are there exactly 6 latex gloves (3 pairs: one white, one black, one bright yellow) laid flat to the right of the goggles?
Do the fingers of all the gloves point towards the right?
Are there exactly two circuit boards side by side at the front right corner of the bench?
Is the left circuit board a standard green PCB and the right one a semi-transparent resin substrate with gold traces?
Are there exactly two screwdrivers (one red/black, one blue/black) placed diagonally above the circuit boards?
Do the metal tips of the screwdrivers point towards the upper left?
Is there a black battery pack with yellow warning stripes to the right of the circuit boards?
Is there a small gray quadcopter drone with 4 folded rotors resting in front of the battery pack?
Are there exactly two tablet devices side by side at the front left corner?
Is the left tablet screen lit (light blue interface) and the right tablet screen off (dark gray reflection)?
Is there a small white desk lamp behind the tablets with its head pointing down?
Are the objects free from severe physical distortions (e.g., melted forms, broken geometry), excluding the intended floating holograms?
Is the image clear, with all main objects fully visible and not significantly cut off at the edges?
